title: Stornoway Airport Café Update – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Please note that the airport café will be closed from Wednesday 14 Jan, reopening 29 Jan for their holidays. The vending machines will remain available in the meantime. Stornoway Airport Part of the Highlands and Islands Airports Limited Group © 2026 Highlands and Islands Airports Limited. All Rights Reserved.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Head Office, Inverness Airport, Inverness, Scotland, IV2 7JB
